<a id="values"></a>

## 🏷️ Values

> Possible values for this enumeration.

| Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `TODO` | Waiting to be started. |
| `IN_PROGRESS` | Actively being worked on. |
| `IN_REVIEW` | Submitted for peer review. |
| `DONE` | Completed and closed. |
